methods.description: Rarefaction analysis is used in palaeoecology to estimate palynological richness, representing changes in landscape diversity. It estimates the number of pollen types based on a common pollen sum.

steps.description: Rarefaction analysis was carried out using Psimpoll 4.27.

methods.description: Cross-correlation analysis evaluates the synchrony between the moisture balance index and CHAR influx over selected time periods.

steps.description: Cross-correlation analysis was performed using R and the stats library.
steps.searchable_summary: perform cross-correlation analysis using R stats library

methods.description: PCA is applied to display relationships between samples and the direction of variation of significant taxa, identifying ecological regime shifts.

steps.description: PCA analysis was carried out on the cross-products matrix of variance/covariance (centred).
inputs: taxa data exceeding 5% of total pollen sum

steps.description: Variables scores were calculated by weighted averaging.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate PCA variable scores by weighted averaging

methods.description: This method involves collecting and analyzing pollen content from surface sediment samples to study modern pollen-vegetation representation.

steps.description: 30 surface sediment samples were collected from the surface to a depth of 1-2 cm.
Pollen samples were processed following standard methods, including chemical treatment and sieving.
steps.searchable_summary: process pollen samples with chemical treatment and sieving

methods.description: This method establishes the chronology of sediment sequences using AMS 14C dating and estimates organic matter content through loss on ignition.

steps.description: AMS 14C dates were calibrated using CALIB 5.0.1 software.
Age-depth model was obtained using MCAge software with a cubic smoothing spline and bootstrap approach.
steps.searchable_summary: create age-depth model using MCAge software

steps.description: Loss on ignition was applied to estimate organic matter content.
steps.searchable_summary: estimate organic matter content using loss on ignition
